stemHtml: During the cruise in a pressurised aircraft cabin, hull damage causes an explosive depressurisation. What would be the experience of the aircraft occupants?

options.a: The occupants seated close to where the problem occurred will immediately notice the problem, while other occupants will feel the effects later.
options.b: Occupants will become aware of the problem due to the slowly decreasing pressure, which will give rise to discomfort if natural venting in body cavities is impaired.
options.c: As air pressure RISES very quickly, ear drums rupture, and it is possible that sinuses and teeth explode, and severe abdominal distension can result in rupturing of internal organs.
options.d: As air pressure DECREASES very quickly, ear drums rupture, and it is possible that sinuses and teeth explode, and severe abdominal distension can result in rupturing of internal organs.
